title: Ollie
overview: The story revolves around Pierre who is 13 years old when he loses his mother. He’s a shy boy who lives only for his passion: skateboarding. Thirty-something Bertrand is a seasonal worker on Pierre’s father’s farm. United by their shared passion of skateboarding, they look to one another for the strength to rebuild and assert themselves, and to try to face up to their impossible losses.

trailers.title: OLLIE Bande Annonce (2025) Théo Christine, Emmanuelle Bercot, Film Français
